questions.question: The cave paintings ---- by tourists for years before archaeologists ---- that the moisture from breath was slowly destroying them.
options: D) had been visited / had realised

feedback.hint: 'For years before archaeologists realised' → anlaşılma noktasından önce süregelen ziyaret. Arkeologların fark etmesi anlık mı?
feedback.logic: 'For years before' + referans noktası → ziyaret süreci önce ve devam ediyordu → Past Perfect Passive: 'had been visited'. Anlama anı → Simple Past: 'realised'.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'had realised' diyerek over-shift yapar; anlama noktası referans noktasıdır, ondan önce değil — Simple Past yeterli.

questions.question: The young novelist ---- her manuscript for eighteen months when her agent suddenly ---- that a major publisher was interested.

feedback.hint: 'For eighteen months when... suddenly called' → süreç + referans noktası.
feedback.logic: 'For eighteen months' + 'when suddenly called' → referans noktasına kadar süren eylem → Past Perfect Continuous: 'had been revising'. Ani haber → Simple Past: 'called'.
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'had revised / called' diyerek Past Perfect kullanır; 'for eighteen months' süreç zarfı → Continuous vurgusu gerektirir.

questions.question: Renewable energy ---- only a small fraction of the global energy mix in 2000, but its share ---- dramatically over the past two decades.

feedback.hint: 'In 2000' → geçmiş. 'Over the past two decades' → geçmişten bugüne.
feedback.logic: 'In 2000' → belirli geçmiş → Simple Past: 'constituted'. 'Over the past two decades' → Present Perfect: 'has grown'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'constituted / grew' diyerek her ikisini de Simple Past yapar; 'over the past two decades' bugüne uzanan süreyi işaret eder — Present Perfect gerekli.

questions.question: I ---- how to code for about a year now, and I ---- an app that tracks personal reading habits by the end of this month.
options: A) have been learning / will have finished
D) have been learning / will finish
E) have learned / will have finished

feedback.hint: 'For about a year now' → süreç. 'By the end of this month' → tamamlanmış olacak.
feedback.logic: 'For about a year now' → Present Perfect Continuous: 'have been learning'. 'By the end of this month' → Future Perfect: 'will have finished'.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'will finish' diyerek Simple Future kullanır; 'by the end of this month' + tamamlanma vurgusu → Future Perfect gerektirir.

questions.question: The athlete ---- his personal best twice already this season, and coaches believe he ---- the world record before the year is out.
options: D) has been breaking / will break

feedback.hint: 'Already this season' → birikimsel geçmiş. Koçların tahmini → gelecek.
feedback.logic: 'Already this season' → Present Perfect: 'has broken'. Gelecek tahmin → Simple Future: 'will break'.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'has been breaking' diyerek Continuous kullanır; kişisel en iyi sayılabilir tekrar eden başarılar → 'has broken' (tamamlanmış eylemler) daha uygun.

questions.question: The teens ---- through their phones in silence for nearly an hour before one of them finally ---- a conversation about the film they had all just watched.

feedback.hint: 'For nearly an hour before one finally initiated' → süreç ve referans noktası.
feedback.logic: Yaklaşık bir saat boyunca süren eylem, konuşma başlatılmadan önce → Past Perfect Continuous: 'had been scrolling'. Konuşma başlatma tek anlık eylem → Simple Past: 'initiated'.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'had scrolled / initiated' diyerek süreç vurgusunu kaybeder; 'for nearly an hour' süreklilik işaret eder → Continuous gerekli.

questions.question: Language researchers note that children who ---- bilingual from birth typically ---- stronger executive function than monolingual peers by the age of seven.
options: C) have been raised / are demonstrating

feedback.hint: Genel bilimsel gerçek. 'Who are raised bilingual' → genel koşul. 'Demonstrate' → genel sonuç.
feedback.logic: Araştırmacılar genel gerçeği not ediyor → Simple Present: 'are raised / demonstrate'. Kalıcı bilimsel gözlem.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'have demonstrated' diyerek Present Perfect kullanır; genel bilimsel gerçek için Simple Present tercih edilir — 'have demonstrated' belirli bir süreye bağlar.

questions.question: The tech company ---- its social media policy three times last year, yet critics argue it still ---- to adequately protect younger users.

feedback.hint: 'Last year' → geçmiş. 'Critics argue it still...' → şimdiki durum.
feedback.logic: 'Last year' → Simple Past: 'revised'. 'Still fails' → şimdiki genel durum → Simple Present: 'fails'.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'has revised' diyerek Present Perfect kullanır; 'last year' belirli geçmiş zaman → Simple Past zorunlu — 'last year' ile Present Perfect kullanılamaz.

questions.question: By the time the panel discussion ends tonight, the participants ---- the same fundamental question for three hours without reaching consensus.
options: D) are going to have debated

feedback.hint: 'By the time it ends tonight' + 'for three hours' → gelecekte tamamlanmış süreç vurgusu.
feedback.logic: 'By the time + present (ends)' + 'for three hours' → süreç ve tamamlanma → Future Perfect Continuous: 'will have been debating'.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'will have debated' diyerek tamamlanmışlığı vurgular; 'for three hours' süreç zarfı → Continuous vurgusu daha doğal.

questions.question: Just as the curtain ---- for the final act, one of the lead actors ---- an injury that would later sideline him for six weeks.

feedback.hint: 'Just as' → devam eden arka plan + anlık olay. Yaralanma anlık mı?
feedback.logic: 'Just as the curtain was rising' → arka plan devam eden eylem → Past Continuous. Oyuncunun yaralanması anlık olay → Simple Past: 'sustained'.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'had sustained' diyerek yaralanmayı perdeden önce başlatır; 'just as' eş zamanlılığı işaret eder — Simple Past gerekli.

questions.question: The fire exit ---- blocked under any circumstances; failure to comply with this regulation ---- result in immediate dismissal.
options: E) is not to be / might

feedback.hint: İşyeri güvenlik kuralı → kesin yasak. Ceza → kesin kuralın yaptırımı.
feedback.logic: 'Must not be blocked' = kesin pasif yasak (güvenlik). 'Will result' = kesin yaptırım bildirimi — politika dili.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'could result' diyerek belirsiz olasılık bildirir; ama yaptırım kesin bir politika kuralıdır — 'will' kesinliği gerektirir.

questions.question: She ---- her acceptance letter somewhere; she ---- it in the pile of documents on her desk, but she cannot be sure.
options: A) must have misplaced / might have left
B) should have misplaced / could leave
C) must have misplaced / must have left
D) may misplace / might have left

feedback.hint: Mektup kayboldu → güçlü geçmiş çıkarım. Nerede olduğu belirsiz → zayıf geçmiş olasılık.
feedback.logic: 'Must have misplaced' = kanıta dayalı güçlü geçmiş çıkarım. 'Might have left' = belirsiz konum olasılığı — 'she cannot be sure' bu belirsizliği destekler.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı her ikisine de 'must have' koyar; 'she cannot be sure' ifadesi ikinci boşluğun belirsizliğini vurgular — 'might' daha uygun.

questions.question: Students ---- complete their lab reports individually; group submissions ---- under the academic integrity policy.
options: A) are expected to / are not permitted
C) are expected to / must not be permitted
D) should / would not be permitted
E) are expected to / will not permit

feedback.hint: Akademik beklenti → resmi kural. 'Are not permitted' → pasif yasak.
feedback.logic: 'Are expected to complete' = resmi akademik beklenti. 'Are not permitted' = pasif kural bildirimi (grup ödevleri kabul edilmez).
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'must / are not permitted' diyerek aşırı güçlü zorunluluk bildirir; 'are expected to' resmi ama daha yumuşak akademik norm için daha uygun.

questions.question: The young director ---- re-edited the opening sequence; the test audience ---- found the original version confusing without that change.
options: A) was right to / would have
B) was right to / will have
D) was right to / could have
E) ought to have / would have

feedback.hint: 'Was right to' → kararın onaylanması. Test izleyicisi hangi koşulda kafası karışırdı?
feedback.logic: 'Was right to re-edit' = geçmişteki kararı onaylama. 'Would have found confusing' = değişiklik yapılmamış olsaydı gerçekleşecek hipotetik sonuç → Type 3.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'should have / would have' diyerek pişmanlık tonu katar; ancak yönetmenin kararı doğruydu — 'was right to' onaylama ifadesidir, eleştiri değil.

questions.question: The noise from next door is constant; they ---- a party, or construction work ---- going on without any prior notice to residents.
options: A) must be having / could be
B) should be having / must be
C) must be having / must be
D) might have had / could be
E) must be having / would be

feedback.hint: Şu an devam eden gürültü → iki olası açıklama. Birincisi güçlü, ikincisi daha zayıf alternatif.
feedback.logic: 'Must be having a party' = güçlü şimdiki çıkarım. 'Could be going on' = daha zayıf alternatif olasılık.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı her ikisine de 'must be' koyar; iki 'must' yan yana olduğunda her ikisi de en güçlü açıklama olur — biri alternatif olduğu için 'could be' daha uygun.

questions.question: You ---- the final chapter without reading the earlier sections; the narrative ---- little sense out of context.
options: A) should not read / would make
D) need not read / would make
E) should not read / will make

feedback.hint: Tavsiye: son bölümü atlamayı önerme. Sonuç → hipotetikel mi, genel mi?
feedback.logic: 'Should not read' = okuma tavsiyesi (zorunluluk değil öneri). 'Would make little sense' = koşullu hipotetik sonuç — son bölümü okursan anlamsız olur.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'makes' diyerek genel gerçek kullanır; 'out of context' ifadesi bağlamsal koşulu işaret eder — 'would make' hipotetik bağlam için daha uygun.

questions.question: The student ---- her thesis draft to her supervisor before the scheduled meeting; she ---- precious feedback time as a result.
options: B) must have sent / has wasted
D) should have sent / had wasted

feedback.hint: Toplantıdan önce göndermek gerekiyordu ama gönderilmedi. Sonuç: zaman israfı.
feedback.logic: 'Should have sent' = geçmişte yapılması gereken ama yapılmamış (pişmanlık). 'Wasted precious feedback time' = gerçekleşen olumsuz sonuç → Simple Past.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'had wasted' diyerek Past Perfect kullanır; sonuç israfı zaten yaşandı, bir referans noktasından önce değil — Simple Past yeterli.

questions.question: Teenagers ---- to face increasingly complex digital landscapes, and no single set of rules ---- adequately prepare them for every scenario they will encounter.

feedback.hint: 'Are bound to' → kaçınılmazlık ifadesi. 'No single set of rules can' → kapasiteyi ifade eden modal.
feedback.logic: 'Are bound to face' = kaçınılmaz geleceği ifade eden idiom. 'No single set of rules can' = genel kapasite sınırını ifade eder.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'will' diyerek kesin geleceği kullanır; 'can' kapasiteyi ifade eder — 'will prepare' ise kesin gelecek taahhüt olur, burada uygun değil.

questions.question: The evidence presented at the hearing ---- fabricated; no credible expert ---- such a conclusion from the available data.
options: A) appears to have been / could draw
B) appears to be / can draw
C) appeared to have been / could have drawn
D) seems to be / would draw
E) appears to have been / would draw

feedback.hint: 'Appears to have been' → geçmişe yönelik görünüş. 'Could draw' → hipotetik kapasite sınırı.
feedback.logic: 'Appears to have been fabricated' = perfect infinitive (sahtecilik geçmişte gerçekleşti). 'No expert could draw' = hipotetik koşul: böyle bir uzman bulunamaz.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'appears to be' diyerek basit infinitive kullanır; sahteciliğin geçmişte gerçekleştiği ima ediliyor — perfect infinitive 'to have been' gerekli.

questions.question: We ---- to queue for hours at the border crossing; if we ---- checked the express lane option beforehand, we ---- so much time.
options: A) had to / had / would not have lost
B) needed to / checked / would not lose
C) had to / had checked / would not have lost
D) were forced to / checked / will not lose
E) had to / had / would not lose

feedback.hint: Saatlerce kuyruğa girmek zorunda kaldık. Eğer express şeridi kontrol etmiş olsaydık → Type 3.
feedback.logic: 'Had to queue' = geçmişteki zorunluluk (eylem gerçekleşti). 'If we had checked' → Type 3 koşul. 'Would not have lost' → Type 3 sonuç.
feedback.pitfall: A şıkkı 'if we had / would not have lost' diyerek koşul cümlesini Past Perfect yapmadan bırakır; Type 3 için 'had checked' (Past Perfect) gerekli.

questions.question: The youth choir ---- to perform at the national ceremony, an honour that ---- once in a generation.
options: C) has been invited / has come

feedback.hint: Davet geçmişten bugüne uzanan haber. 'Comes once in a generation' → genel gerçek.
feedback.logic: 'Has been invited' → Present Perfect Passive (güncel, yeni gelişme). 'Comes once in a generation' → genel gerçek → Simple Present.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'has come' diyerek Present Perfect kullanır; 'comes once in a generation' değişmez genel gerçek → Simple Present gerekli.

questions.question: The sculptor's technique ---- once ---- as unconventional; today, however, it ---- as a pioneering contribution to contemporary art.
options: B) has been / dismissed / was regarded
C) was / being dismissed / is regarded
E) was / dismissed / has been regarded

feedback.hint: 'Once dismissed' → geçmişteki olumsuz değerlendirme. 'Today... is regarded' → şimdiki değerlendirme.
feedback.logic: 'Was once dismissed' → geçmişte olumsuz değerlendirme → Simple Past Passive. 'Today... is regarded as' → şimdiki genel kabul → Simple Present Passive.
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'has been regarded' diyerek Present Perfect kullanır; 'today' ile birlikte kullanılan şimdiki değerlendirme → Simple Present Passive daha doğal.

questions.question: The entire city centre ---- to pedestrians for the weekend festival, and thousands of visitors ---- to attend.
options: A) will be opened / are expected
C) will be opened / were expected
D) is being opened / are expected
E) will have been opened / are expected

feedback.hint: Gelecek hafta sonu planı. 'Are expected' → şimdiki beklenti bildirimi.
feedback.logic: 'Will be opened' → gelecek plan → Simple Future Passive. 'Are expected to attend' → şimdiki beklenti → Simple Present Passive.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'is being opened' diyerek şu an devam eden süreci gösterir; hafta sonu planı henüz gerçekleşmedi — 'will be opened' gerekli.

questions.question: It ---- widely ---- that the data ---- without proper ethical approval, which has now prompted a formal investigation.
options: D) was / alleged / has been collected
E) is / alleged / has been collected

feedback.hint: 'It is alleged that' → impersonal passive. 'Data was collected' → geçmişte yapılan eylem.
feedback.logic: 'It is widely alleged that' = impersonal passive (güncel iddia). 'Was collected without approval' → geçmişte gerçekleşen eylem → Simple Past Passive.
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'has been collected' diyerek Present Perfect kullanır; veri toplama belirli bir geçmiş eylemdir, araştırmanın şimdiye uzanan sonucu değil.

questions.question: The winner ---- yet to ---- announced; the judges ---- still ---- over their final decision when the power cut interrupted the ceremony.

feedback.hint: 'Was yet to be announced' → o anda henüz duyurulmamış. Hakemler o anda hâlâ tartışıyordu.
feedback.logic: 'Was yet to be announced' = pasif infinitive (henüz açıklanmamıştı). 'Were still deliberating when the power cut interrupted' → Past Continuous arka plan + Simple Past kesinti.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'is / be' diyerek Simple Present kullanır; bağlam geçmişte bir seremoni — 'was yet to be' gerekli.

questions.question: The mural ---- over at some point before the building ---- for renovation, but its original design ---- preserved in archival photographs.
options: A) had been painted / was demolished / has been
B) was painted / had been demolished / has been
C) had been painted / was demolished / was
D) was painted / was demolished / has been
E) had been painted / had been demolished / was

feedback.hint: Üç eylem kronolojisi: resim → yıkım → dijital arşiv. Hangisi hangisinden önce?
feedback.logic: Resim yıkımdan önce → Past Perfect Passive: 'had been painted'. Yıkım referans noktası → Simple Past Passive: 'was demolished'. Arşiv bugüne kadar korunuyor → Present Perfect Passive: 'has been'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'was' diyerek arşivin korunmasını Simple Past yapar; fotoğraflar hâlâ arşivde durduğundan Present Perfect gerekli.

questions.question: The research findings ---- at the conference next week, and a full report ---- to peer-reviewed journals immediately afterwards.
options: A) will be presented / will be submitted
B) are presented / will be submitted
C) will be presented / is submitted
D) will have been presented / will submit
E) are being presented / will be submitted

feedback.hint: 'Next week' → gelecek plan. 'Immediately afterwards' → ardından gelecek eylem.
feedback.logic: 'Next week' → Simple Future Passive: 'will be presented'. 'Immediately afterwards' → Simple Future Passive: 'will be submitted'.
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'are being presented' diyerek şu an devam eden sunum gösterir; konferans gelecek haftada — 'will be presented' gerekli.

questions.question: The community centre ---- closed for over a year before it finally ---- to the public with a completely renovated interior.
options: D) had been / has been reopened

feedback.hint: 'For over a year before it finally was reopened' → kapalılık yeniden açılıştan önce.
feedback.logic: 'For over a year before... was reopened' → referans noktasından önce süregelen durum → Past Perfect: 'had been'. Yeniden açılış → Simple Past Passive: 'was reopened'.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'has been / was reopened' diyerek Present Perfect kullanır; 'before it was reopened' bağlamı geçmişe sabitler — Past Perfect gerekli.

questions.question: The book ---- on three continents simultaneously, and the author ---- to appear on several high-profile television programmes to promote it.
options: A) is being released / has been invited
B) has been released / was invited
C) is being released / was invited
D) will be released / has been invited
E) is being released / is invited

feedback.hint: Kitap şu an yayınlanıyor. Davet güncel haber.
feedback.logic: 'Is being released' → şu anda gerçekleşen yayın → Present Continuous Passive. 'Has been invited' → güncel yeni gelişme → Present Perfect Passive.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'was invited' diyerek daveti geçmişe çeker; davet kitabın yayınıyla eş zamanlı güncel bir haberdir — Present Perfect daha uygun.

questions.question: Experts predict that microplastic contamination in freshwater sources ---- in many regions unless urgent remedial action ---- immediately.
options: A) will continue to worsen / is taken
B) continues to worsen / was taken
C) will continue to worsen / will be taken
D) would continue to worsen / is taken
E) will continue to worsen / has been taken

feedback.hint: 'Predict that... unless' → gelecek tahmin + gerçek koşul bağlacı. 'Unless' ardından hangi zaman?
feedback.logic: 'Predict that... will continue' → gerçek gelecek tahmin. 'Unless + Simple Present' → gerçek koşul: 'is taken' (time clause — Present).
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'will be taken' diyerek 'unless' ardından Future kullanır; 'unless/if' ile başlayan time/condition clause'larda Simple Present kullanılır — 'will' kullanılamaz.

questions.question: If critical thinking ---- as a standalone subject in schools, students ---- better equipped to evaluate misinformation online.
options: C) had been taught / would be

feedback.hint: Eleştirel düşünce şu an bağımsız ders olarak verilmiyor → mevcut gerçekliğe karşı hipotez.
feedback.logic: Mevcut gerçekliğe karşı hipotez → Type 2: 'were taught'. Şimdiki koşullu sonuç: 'would be'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'had been taught / would be' diyerek Mixed Conditional kurar; ancak bağlam tamamen şimdiki durum — Type 2 gerekli.

questions.question: I wish my parents ---- my choice of university course; their persistent disapproval ---- my confidence more than I expected.
options: C) had supported / would have eroded

feedback.hint: 'I wish' + şimdiki durum. Sonuç: şimdiki devam eden etki.
feedback.logic: 'Wish' + mevcut duruma pişmanlık → Simple Past: 'supported'. 'Is eroding' → şimdiki devam eden sonuç → Present Continuous.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'would support' diyerek 'wish + would' kullanır; irade dışı genel bir tutum için 'wish + Simple Past' gerekli — 'would' sadece iradeli tekrar eden davranış için.

questions.question: ---- the early warning system ---- properly calibrated, the coastal communities ---- evacuated in time.
options: A) Had / been / would have been
E) Were / to be / would have been

feedback.hint: Inverted conditional. 'Had + been + past participle' → hangi type? Topluluklar zamanında tahliye edilemedi.
feedback.logic: 'Had the system been properly calibrated' → Past Perfect Passive inverted (Type 3). 'Would have been evacuated' → Type 3 sonuç.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'would be' diyerek şimdiki sonuç verir; inverted Type 3 geçmiş gerçekleşmemiş sonuç gerektirir — 'would have been'.

questions.question: Unless teenagers ---- the habit of verifying sources, the spread of misinformation ---- impossible to contain.

feedback.hint: 'Unless' = 'if not'. Gerçek uyarı → Type 1. Sonuç gerçek gelecek.
feedback.logic: 'Unless + Simple Present' → Type 1: 'develop'. Gerçek gelecek sonuç: 'will prove'.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'developed / would prove' diyerek Type 2 kurar; 'unless' + gerçek uyarı bağlamı Type 1 gerektirir — Type 2 hayali.

questions.question: If only the documentary ---- more widely before the elections; public opinion ---- very differently now.
options: A) had been circulated / might look
C) had been circulated / would have looked

feedback.hint: 'If only' + geçmiş pişmanlık. 'Now' → şimdiki etki. Mixed mi, Type 3 mü?
feedback.logic: 'If only' + geçmiş pişmanlık → Past Perfect Passive: 'had been circulated'. 'Now' → şimdiki etki → Mixed Conditional: 'might look'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'would have looked' diyerek Type 3 sonuç verir; 'now' şimdiki anı gösterir → Mixed Conditional gerekli.

questions.question: She wishes she ---- her time more wisely during the internship; all that procrastination ---- her portfolio considerably.
options: A) had managed / has set back
C) had managed / would have set back
E) would manage / has set back

feedback.hint: 'Wish' + geçmiş pişmanlık. Sonuç: zaten gerçekleşmiş, bugüne uzanan etki.
feedback.logic: 'Wish' + geçmiş pişmanlık → Past Perfect: 'had managed'. 'Has set back considerably' = geçmişten bugüne uzanan gerçek etki → Present Perfect.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'would have set back' diyerek Type 3 sonuç verir; gecikmenin portfolyoya etkisi zaten gerçekleşmiş — Present Perfect 'has set back' gerçeği aktarır.

questions.question: Suppose the school ---- its annual sports day due to bad weather; students ---- the opportunity to compete that they ---- months preparing for.
options: A) cancelled / would lose / had spent
B) cancels / will lose / have spent
C) were to cancel / would lose / had spent
D) cancelled / would have lost / spent
E) were to cancel / would have lost / had spent

feedback.hint: 'Suppose + were to cancel' → resmi gelecek hipotez. Öğrenciler aylarca hazırlandı (geçmiş).
feedback.logic: 'Were to cancel' = 'suppose' + formal hypothetical (Type 2). 'Would lose' = Type 2 sonuç. 'They had spent months preparing' → geçmişte zaten hazırlık yapılmıştı → Past Perfect.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'cancels / will lose' diyerek Type 1 kurar; 'suppose' + hipotetik senaryo Type 2 için 'were to cancel' gerektirir.

questions.question: I wish the city ---- so much on luxury infrastructure; that money ---- used to address chronic homelessness instead.
options: A) hadn't spent / could have been
C) hadn't spent / would have been
D) wouldn't spend / could have been

feedback.hint: 'I wish' + geçmiş pişmanlık. 'Could have been used instead' → geçmiş gerçekleşmemiş alternatif.
feedback.logic: 'Wish' + geçmiş pişmanlık → Past Perfect: 'hadn't spent'. 'Could have been used instead' = geçmişte mümkün olan alternatif eylem (gerçekleşmedi).
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'wouldn't spend' diyerek 'wish + wouldn't' yapısını kurar; 'spending' iradeli bir karar olsa da geçmiş pişmanlık için Past Perfect gerekli — 'wouldn't' tekrar eden irade için.

questions.question: It's high time teenagers ---- more agency in decisions about their education rather than ---- passive recipients of top-down policy.

feedback.hint: 'It's high time + ...' → Simple Past subjunctive. 'Rather than + ...' → gerund.
feedback.logic: 'It's high time + Simple Past Subjunctive': 'were given'. 'Rather than + gerund': 'being passive recipients'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'to be' diyerek 'rather than' ardından infinitive kullanır; 'rather than' edat olarak gerund alır — 'being' gerekli.

questions.question: Had the festival organisers ---- more thoroughly for adverse weather, the event ---- cancelled, and thousands of attendees ---- their plans.
options: A) planned / would not have been / would not have had to change
B) planned / would not be / would not have to change
C) been planning / would not have been / would not change
D) planned / had not been / would not change
E) been planning / would not be / would not have changed

feedback.hint: Inverted Type 3. Üç eylem de aynı geçmiş hipotetik koşulun sonucudur.
feedback.logic: 'Had the organisers planned' → inverted Past Perfect (Type 3). 'Would not have been cancelled' + 'would not have had to change' → Type 3 sonuçlar.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'would not be / would not have to change' diyerek şimdiki sonuç verir; tüm bağlam geçmiş — Type 3 sonuçlar gerekli.

questions.question: The school board proposed ---- all extracurricular activities ---- protected from budget cuts and ---- no programme ---- discontinued without community consultation.

feedback.hint: 'Proposed that' → subjunctive. İki paralel öneri, her ikisi de 'that' ile.
feedback.logic: 'Propose that + subjunctive (base form)': 'be protected / be discontinued'. Her iki öneri de 'that' noun clause içinde.
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'and / is' diyerek ikinci öneriye 'that' eklemez ve 'be' yerine 'is' kullanır; subjunctive 'be' gerekli, 'and is' subjunctive dışına çıkar.

questions.question: The coach explained ---- her athletes had underperformed ---- they ---- adequately acclimatised to the altitude before the competition.
options: A) that / because / had not been
C) that / because / have not been
D) why / as / had not been
E) that / since / had not been

feedback.hint: 'Explained that' → backshift. 'Because they had not been acclimatised' → iki eylemin kronolojisi.
feedback.logic: 'Explained that they had underperformed' → backshift. 'Because they had not been acclimatised' → performanstan önce gerçekleşmiş durum → Past Perfect Passive.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'why / were not' diyerek 'explained why' + Simple Past kullanır; 'explained why' dolaylı soru noun clause → 'because' ile geçiş kurulması daha doğal; ayrıca 'were not' backshifted değil.

questions.question: It is ---- disputable ---- teenagers today feel more isolated than previous generations, given the contradictory evidence from longitudinal studies.

feedback.hint: 'Highly disputable' → dereceyi vurgulayan zarf. 'Whether teenagers feel more isolated' → tartışmalı konu → evet/hayır sorusu.
feedback.logic: 'Highly disputable whether' = evet/hayır konusunda tartışmalı. 'Whether... given contradictory evidence' → belirsizliği vurgular.
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'very / whether' diyerek 'very' kullanır; akademik bağlamda 'highly disputable' sabit deyimdir — 'very disputable' daha az akademik.

questions.question: The documentary maker wanted to know ---- young activists ---- their use of social media as a tool for change or merely as a form of performative engagement.

feedback.hint: Belgeselci bilmek istiyor → dolaylı soru. Eylem ya araç ya performatif → ikili seçim. Backshift var mı?
feedback.logic: 'Wanted to know whether' → evet/hayır dolaylı sorusu. Backshift: 'view' → 'viewed'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'whether / view' diyerek backshift yapmaz; 'wanted to know' (geçmiş) backshift gerektirir — 'viewed'.

questions.question: Research consistently demonstrates ---- exposure to diverse cultural narratives during adolescence ---- broadens empathy and ---- fosters more nuanced social judgement.
options: A) that / not only / but also
B) how / not only / but also
D) what / not only / but also

feedback.hint: 'Demonstrates that' → olgusal noun clause. İki paralel sonuç: 'not only... but also'.
feedback.logic: 'Demonstrates that' → olgusal bağlaç. 'Not only broadens... but also fosters' → paralel correlative yapı.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'both / and' diyerek 'demonstrates that... both broadens and fosters' kurar; dilbilgisel mümkün ama 'not only... but also' araştırma bulgularında daha akademik vurgu sağlar.

questions.question: She was unsure ---- to interpret the ambiguous feedback her mentor had given her or ---- to request a follow-up meeting.

feedback.hint: İki farklı belirsizlik: geri bildirimi nasıl yorumlayacağı + toplantı isteyip istemeyeceği.
feedback.logic: 'Unsure how to interpret' = biçim sorusu noun clause. 'Whether to request' = evet/hayır kararı noun clause.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'whether / whether' diyerek her ikisini de evet/hayır sorusu yapar; yorumlama biçim sorusudur ('how') — 'how to interpret' doğru.

questions.question: The editor insisted ---- every source in the article ---- independently verified and ---- no claim ---- without supporting evidence.
options: A) that / be / that / be made
B) that / was / and / was made
C) whether / be / whether / be made
D) that / be / and / be made
E) that / is / that / is made

feedback.hint: 'Insisted that' → subjunctive. İki paralel talep, her ikisi de 'that' ile.
feedback.logic: 'Insist that + subjunctive': 'be independently verified / be made'. Her iki talep 'that' noun clause içinde, paralel.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'and / be made' diyerek ikinci 'that'ı düşürür; formal yazıda paralel taleplerde 'that' tekrarı tutarlılığı korur.

questions.question: ---- remains most puzzling to linguists is ---- certain grammatical structures appear universally across unrelated languages that ---- never been in contact.

feedback.hint: İlk: özne noun clause. İkinci: 'is' ardından noun clause. 'Languages that have never been in contact' → temas olmadı.
feedback.logic: 'What remains most puzzling' → subject noun clause. 'Is that certain structures appear' → predicate noun clause. 'Languages that have never been in contact' → defining + Present Perfect.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'How / that' diyerek 'How remains most puzzling' kurar; anlatmak istenen 'en çok neyin şaşırtıcı olduğu' — 'what' gerekli.

questions.question: She told her mentor ---- she ---- between accepting the prestigious fellowship and staying close to home, and ---- decision ---- deeply conflicted.
options: A) that / was torn / that every / felt
B) that / is torn / and the / felt
C) whether / was torn / that the / feels
D) that / was torn / that the / feels
E) how / was torn / that every / felt

feedback.hint: 'Told that' → backshift. İki bağımsız bildiri. Backshift uygulanmalı.
feedback.logic: 'Told that she was torn' → backshift. 'That every decision felt conflicted' → 'every + singular noun' → 'felt'.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'that the / feels' diyerek 'the decision feels' → backshift yapılmamış; 'told' backshift gerektirir — 'felt'.

questions.question: The psychologist noted ---- teenagers who use social media primarily for ---- connection rather than passive scrolling ---- better mental health outcomes.

feedback.hint: 'Noted that' → olgusal noun clause. 'Active connection' → sıfat. Genel araştırma bulgusu → hangi zaman?
feedback.logic: 'Noted that' → 'that' noun clause. 'Active connection' → sıfat. 'Teenagers... report' → genel gerçek → Simple Present.
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'reported' diyerek Simple Past kullanır; genel araştırma bulgusu kalıcı gerçekse Simple Present kullanılır — 'reported' geçmişteki tek bir bulguya bağlar.

questions.question: The campaign manager urged volunteers ---- as many households as possible before election day without ---- overly persuasive or intrusive.

feedback.hint: 'Urge + object + ...' yapısı. 'Without + ...' → edat tamlaması.
feedback.logic: 'Urge + object + infinitive': 'to contact'. 'Without + gerund': 'being overly persuasive'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'to contact / to be' diyerek 'without' ardından infinitive kullanır; 'without' edat olarak gerund alır — 'being' gerekli.

questions.question: The charity managed ---- sufficient funds to keep the youth shelter open for another year, thereby ---- hundreds of vulnerable teenagers off the streets.

feedback.hint: 'Manage + ...' yapısı. 'Thereby + ...' → sonuç bildirimi.
feedback.logic: 'Manage + infinitive': 'to raise'. 'Thereby + gerund': 'keeping' — participial sonuç bildirimi.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'to keep' diyerek 'thereby' ardından infinitive kullanır; 'thereby' participial phrase gerund gerektirir — 'keeping'.

questions.question: Many students have grown accustomed to ---- assignments at the last minute, ---- themselves that the adrenaline actually sharpens their thinking.

feedback.hint: 'Grow accustomed to + ...' yapısı. İkinci boşluk: eş zamanlı kendini ikna etme.
feedback.logic: 'Grow accustomed to + gerund': 'submitting'. 'Convincing themselves' → eş zamanlı tutum participial phrase.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'submitting / to convince' diyerek 'to convince' infinitive kullanır; 'convincing themselves' eş zamanlı participial yapısıdır — 'to convince' amaç bildirir.

questions.question: He came very close to ---- his sponsorship deal after the controversy but ultimately succeeded in ---- the situation before it escalated further.

feedback.hint: 'Come close to + ...' yapısı. 'Succeed in + ...' yapısı.
feedback.logic: 'Come close to + gerund': 'losing'. 'Succeed in + gerund': 'defusing'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'losing / to defuse' diyerek 'succeed in' ardından infinitive kullanır; 'succeed in + gerund' sabit deyimdir — 'defusing' gerekli.

questions.question: The platform ---- its users ---- content without acknowledging ---- it from the original creators, a practice that has provoked significant backlash.
options: A) allows / to share / having taken
E) lets / to share / having taken

feedback.hint: 'Allow + object + ...' yapısı. 'Without + ...' → edat. 'Having taken' → geçmiş eylem.
feedback.logic: 'Allow + object + infinitive': 'to share'. 'Without + gerund': ancak 'having taken' perfect gerund (içerik daha önce alındı) → 'without acknowledging having taken'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'taking' diyerek basit gerund kullanır; içerik daha önce alındı ve bu eyleme atıfta bulunuluyor → perfect gerund 'having taken' gerekli.

questions.question: The journalist spent months ---- the story, only ---- that the principal source had fabricated key details.

feedback.hint: 'Spend time + ...' yapısı. 'Only to + infinitive' → beklenmedik olumsuz sonuç.
feedback.logic: 'Spend + gerund': 'investigating'. 'Only to discover' → beklenmedik hayal kırıklığı → 'only to + infinitive'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'discovering' diyerek 'only to discover' yerine gerund kullanır; 'only to + infinitive' deyimsel olarak beklenmedik sonucu ifade eder — gerund bu anlamı taşımaz.

questions.question: His failure ---- adequate time to revision resulted in ---- below the grade threshold required for his chosen university.

feedback.hint: 'Failure to + ...' yapısı. 'Result in + ...' yapısı.
feedback.logic: 'Failure + infinitive': 'to allocate'. 'Result in + gerund': 'scoring below the threshold'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'to allocate / to score' diyerek 'result in' ardından infinitive kullanır; 'result in + gerund' sabit deyimdir — 'scoring' gerekli.

questions.question: The youth council is committed to ---- youth voices amplified in local government and ---- that young people have genuine decision-making power.

feedback.hint: 'Be committed to + ...' yapısı. İki paralel eylem.
feedback.logic: 'Be committed to + gerund': 'getting... amplified'. 'And + gerund': 'ensuring' — paralel yapı.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'getting / to ensure' diyerek paralel yapıyı bozar; 'committed to' edat tamlaması her iki eylem için de gerund gerektirir.

questions.question: The young designer claims ---- inspired by brutalist architecture, ---- its starkness into a visual language that resonates with contemporary audiences.

feedback.hint: 'Claim + ...' yapısı. İlham geçmişten mı geliyor, şimdiden mi? İkinci boşluk: eş zamanlı süreç.
feedback.logic: 'Claims to have been inspired' → perfect infinitive (ilham geçmişte alındı, etkisi devam ediyor). 'Translating its starkness' → eş zamanlı süreç participial phrase.
feedback.pitfall: A şıkkı 'to be / translating' diyerek basit infinitive kullanır; ilham geçmişten geliyor → perfect infinitive 'to have been inspired' gerekli.

questions.question: The young activist faced considerable ridicule for ---- attention to issues that many considered ---- exaggerated, yet she persisted.

feedback.hint: 'Face ridicule for + ...' yapısı. 'Considered + ...' → nesne tamamlayıcısı.
feedback.logic: 'Faced ridicule for + gerund': 'drawing'. 'Considered + to be + adjective': 'considered to be exaggerated' — standart yapı.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'drawing / being' diyerek 'considered being' kullanır; 'consider + object + to be' sabit yapıdır — 'to be exaggerated' gerekli.

questions.question: The musician, ---- debut album ---- released to critical acclaim a decade ago, has just announced a world tour.
options: C) of whom the / has been

feedback.hint: 'Müzisyenin albümü' → iyelik. 'A decade ago' → geçmiş.
feedback.logic: 'Whose debut album' → iyelik. 'Was released a decade ago' → Simple Past Passive.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'has been released' diyerek Present Perfect kullanır; 'a decade ago' belirli geçmiş zaman → Simple Past Passive gerekli.

questions.question: The aspect of peer pressure ---- most concerns researchers is not the obvious forms but the subtle social dynamics ---- operate beneath conscious awareness.

feedback.hint: 'Aspect that concerns' → defining, subject. 'Dynamics that operate' → defining, subject.
feedback.logic: 'The aspect of peer pressure that most concerns researchers' → defining, subject → 'that'. 'Subtle social dynamics that operate' → defining, subject → 'that'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'that / which' diyerek ikinci boşlukta 'which' kullanır; defining bağlamda 'that' daha standart — 'which' non-defining çağrışımı.

questions.question: The collaboration, from ---- both artists have benefited enormously, has produced work ---- neither could have created alone.

feedback.hint: Virgüllü non-defining + preposition. 'Work that neither could have created' → defining.
feedback.logic: 'From which both artists have benefited' → preposition + which, non-defining. 'Work that neither could have created alone' → defining, object → 'that'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'which / which' diyerek ikinci boşluğa 'which' koyar; defining bağlamda 'that' standart — 'which' non-defining çağrışımı.

questions.question: The career ---- she has devoted the past fifteen years is one ---- demands constant self-reinvention.

feedback.hint: 'Devoted to' → preposition. 'One that demands' → defining.
feedback.logic: 'The career to which she has devoted' → 'devote to something' → preposition + which. 'One that demands' → defining subject: 'that'.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'which / which' diyerek 'which she has devoted' kullanır; 'devote to' bağımlı preposition → 'to which' zorunlu.

questions.question: The platform has faced repeated criticism, ---- strongest concerns ---- centred around its failure to protect younger users.

feedback.hint: 'The strongest concerns of which' → partitive yapı. 'Have centred' → Present Perfect.
feedback.logic: 'The strongest concerns of which have centred around' → partitive: 'of which the strongest concerns'. Present Perfect: 'have centred'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'whose / have' diyerek 'whose strongest concerns have centred' kullanır; dilbilgisel doğru ama 'of which' formal yazıda daha tercih edilir; her ikisi kabul edilebilir ama E daha akademik.

questions.question: She is one of those rare individuals ---- intelligence is matched equally by compassion, ---- makes her an exceptionally effective leader.

feedback.hint: İyelik: 'bireyin zekâsı'. İkinci boşluk: önceki tüm cümleye atıf.
feedback.logic: 'Whose intelligence' → iyelik. İkinci boşluk: tüm önceki fikre atıf → non-defining → 'which'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'whose / that' diyerek non-defining bağlamda 'that' kullanır; virgüllü non-defining clause 'that' alamaz — 'which' zorunlu.

questions.question: ----ever designed this user interface clearly understood the psychological triggers ---- keep users engaged far beyond their intended session length.

feedback.hint: 'Whoever designed' → özne. 'Triggers that keep users engaged' → defining.
feedback.logic: 'Whoever designed' = 'the person who designed' → subject → 'whoever'. 'Triggers that keep users' → defining subject: 'that'.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'Whomever' diyerek nesne halini kullanır; 'designed' fiilinin öznesi → özne hali 'whoever' gerekli.

questions.question: The village ---- I spent three weeks volunteering last summer has a surprisingly vibrant arts scene, ---- I had not expected at all.

feedback.hint: 'Village where' → yer zarflığı. İkinci boşluk: önceki tüm tespite atıf.
feedback.logic: 'The village where I spent three weeks' → zarflık: 'where'. İkinci: önceki tüm fikre atıf → non-defining → 'which'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'that' diyerek non-defining bağlamda kullanım hatası yapar; virgüllü non-defining clause 'that' alamaz — 'which' zorunlu.

questions.question: The initiative, ---- goal it is to bridge the digital divide between urban and rural schools, ---- secured substantial government funding this year.

feedback.hint: 'Girişimin amacı' → iyelik. Özne tekil mi?
feedback.logic: 'Whose goal it is' → iyelik. 'The initiative' tekil → 'has secured'.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'whose / have' diyerek plural fiil kullanır; 'the initiative' tekil özne → 'has' gerekli.

questions.question: There is a growing body of evidence to ---- researchers point when arguing that sleep deprivation in adolescents constitutes ---- a public health crisis.

feedback.hint: 'Point to evidence' → preposition. 'Constitutes what amounts to a crisis' → 'what amounts to' deyimi.
feedback.logic: 'Evidence to which researchers point' → 'point to + object' → 'to which'. 'Constitutes what amounts to a public health crisis' → 'what amounts to' deyimi (eşdeğeri).
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'that amounts to' diyerek 'what amounts to' deyimini bozar; 'what amounts to' → 'what' deyimsel ifadenin parçasıdır.

questions.question: ---- resilience shown by ---- young athletes in ---- face of repeated setbacks is ---- quality that coaches consistently cite as the most decisive factor.

feedback.hint: 'The resilience shown by' → sıfat tamlaması. 'Young athletes' → genel. 'In the face of' → sabit deyim. 'A quality' → ilk kez.
feedback.logic: 'The resilience shown by' → sıfat tamlaması → 'the'. 'Young athletes' → genel → article yok. 'In the face of' → sabit deyim → 'the'. 'A quality that coaches cite' → ilk kez → 'a'.
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'the quality' diyerek belirli artikel kullanır; 'a quality that coaches cite' ilk kez tanımlanan, belirsiz nitelik — 'a' gerekli.

questions.question: ---- rate at ---- which ---- digital misinformation spreads has far outpaced ---- ability of fact-checking organisations to respond effectively.

feedback.hint: 'The rate at which' → sabit deyim. 'Digital misinformation' → genel. 'The ability of fact-checking organisations' → belirli.
feedback.logic: 'The rate at which' → sabit deyim + 'the'. 'Digital misinformation' → genel → article yok. 'The ability of fact-checking organisations' → belirli (tanımlanmış grup) → 'the'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'the digital misinformation' diyerek genel kavrama 'the' koyar; 'digital misinformation' genel → article yok.

questions.question: ---- majority of ---- students surveyed said they felt ---- pressure to perform academically was adversely affecting ---- quality of their sleep.

feedback.hint: 'The majority of students surveyed' → belirli. 'The pressure to perform' → belirli. 'The quality of their sleep' → belirli.
feedback.logic: 'The majority of students surveyed' → belirli ('the majority of' + sıfat tamlaması). 'Students surveyed' → sıfat tamlaması → article yok. 'The pressure to perform' → sıfat tamlaması → 'the'. 'The quality of their sleep' → belirli → 'the'.
feedback.pitfall: A şıkkı 'the / the / the / the' diyerek tüm boşluklara 'the' koyar; 'students surveyed' sıfat tamlamasıyla belirlenmiş — article yok.

questions.question: It was ---- extraordinary turn of events that led to ---- overnight transformation of ---- previously unknown street artist into ---- global cultural phenomenon.

feedback.hint: 'An extraordinary turn' → ünlü harf. 'The overnight transformation' → belirli. 'A previously unknown artist' → ilk kez. 'A global phenomenon' → ilk kez.
feedback.logic: 'An extraordinary turn' → 'e' ünlü → 'an'. 'The overnight transformation' → sıfat tamlaması → 'the'. 'A previously unknown street artist' → belirsiz → 'a'. 'A global cultural phenomenon' → belirsiz → 'a'.
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'the global phenomenon' diyerek belirli artikel kullanır; bu fenomen ilk kez tanıtılıyor — 'a' gerekli.

questions.question: ---- lack of critical engagement with ---- media content, combined with ---- overreliance on ---- algorithm-driven feeds, poses significant risks for democratic discourse.

feedback.hint: 'The lack of' → belirli eksiklik. 'Media content' → genel. 'An overreliance' → ilk kez, ünlü. 'Algorithm-driven feeds' → genel.
feedback.logic: 'The lack of critical engagement' → belirli → 'the'. 'Media content' → genel → article yok. 'An overreliance' → 'o' ünlü → 'an'. 'Algorithm-driven feeds' → genel → article yok.
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'the media content' diyerek genel kavrama 'the' koyar; 'media content' genel → article yok.

questions.question: ---- creativity required to produce ---- truly groundbreaking work cannot be taught through ---- conventional instruction alone; ---- certain degree of unstructured exploration is essential.

feedback.hint: 'The creativity required to' → sıfat tamlaması. 'Truly groundbreaking work' → genel. 'Conventional instruction' → genel. 'A certain degree' → belirsiz tekil.
feedback.logic: 'The creativity required' → sıfat tamlaması → 'the'. 'Truly groundbreaking work' → genel → article yok. 'Conventional instruction' → genel → article yok. 'A certain degree' → belirsiz → 'a'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'a groundbreaking work' diyerek 'work' kelimesine belirsiz artikel koyar; 'truly groundbreaking work' sayılamaz genel → article yok.

questions.question: ---- three of the five proposals submitted ---- approved, but ---- committee requested that ---- fourth be substantially revised before consideration.

feedback.hint: 'Only three of five' → plural. 'The committee' → bilinen belirli grup. 'The fourth' → sıralı belirli.
feedback.logic: 'Only three... were approved' → plural. 'The committee' → belirli → 'the'. 'The fourth' → belirli sıralı sayı → 'the'.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'a fourth' diyerek belirsiz kullanır; sıralama içindeki dördüncü teklif belirli — 'the fourth' gerekli.

questions.question: ---- information she received during ---- orientation was far more useful than ---- vague advice her peers had given her before ---- enrolment.

feedback.hint: 'The information she received' → sıfat tamlaması. 'The orientation' → belirli. 'A vague advice' → ... 'advice' sayılamaz. 'Before enrolment' → genel.
feedback.logic: 'The information she received' → sıfat tamlaması → 'the'. 'The orientation' → belirli etkinlik → 'the'. 'Vague advice' → sayılamaz, 'a vague advice' yanlış → sadece 'the vague advice' sıfat tamlamasıyla veya article yok... 'a' sayılamaz ile kullanılamaz. Doğru: 'the vague advice her peers had given' → sıfat tamlaması → 'the'. 'Before enrolment' → genel → article yok.
feedback.feedback_correction: Doğru cevap A'dır: The / the / the / - → 'the vague advice her peers had given' sıfat tamlamasıyla belirlenmiş.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'a vague advice' diyerek sayılamaz 'advice' kelimesine belirsiz artikel koyar — 'advice' sayılamaz, 'a' alamaz.

questions.question: ---- both participants had declined to comment initially, ---- one of them eventually agreed to give ---- exclusive interview to ---- local newspaper.

feedback.hint: 'Although + full clause' → zıtlık. 'One of them' → zamir. 'An exclusive interview' → ünlü. 'A local newspaper' → belirsiz.
feedback.logic: 'Although' → full clause bağlacı. 'One of them' → belirsiz zamir. 'An exclusive interview' → 'e' ünlü → 'an'. 'A local newspaper' → belirsiz → 'a'.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'Despite' diyerek tam cümle bağlacı yerine edat kullanır; 'both participants had declined' tam cümle — 'although' gerekli.

questions.question: ---- extent to ---- which social media ---- contributes to ---- body image dissatisfaction in adolescents remains ---- highly contested empirical question.

feedback.hint: 'The extent to which' → sabit deyim. 'Social media' → genel. 'Body image dissatisfaction' → genel. 'A highly contested question' → ilk kez.
feedback.logic: 'The extent to which' → sabit deyim → 'the'. 'Social media' → genel → article yok. 'Body image dissatisfaction' → genel → article yok. 'A highly contested empirical question' → belirsiz → 'a'.
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'the highly contested question' diyerek belirli artikel kullanır; bu soru önceden belirtilmemiş — 'a' gerekli.

questions.question: ---- all the evidence suggesting that sleep deprivation impairs learning, many students ---- continue to sacrifice rest for extra study time.

feedback.hint: 'All the evidence' → isim öbeği. İkinci boşluk: zıtlığı sürdüren, cümle içinde konumlanan zarf.
feedback.logic: 'Notwithstanding + noun phrase' → resmi edat bağlacı. 'Nonetheless' → cümle başı zıtlık zarfı; ancak 'nonetheless' ve 'nevertheless' her ikisi de doğru. A şıkkı akademik düzeyde en güçlü kombinasyon.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'Although' diyerek tam cümle bağlacı kullanır; 'all the evidence' isim öbeği → 'although' tam cümle bekler, isim öbeği alamaz.

questions.question: The film was shot on a minimal budget; ----, it managed to convey ---- emotional depth ---- many big-budget productions fail to achieve.
options: A) yet / a level of / that
D) yet / the kind of / that
E) still / a level of / which

feedback.hint: Noktalı virgül + zıtlık. 'A level of emotional depth that big-budget films fail to achieve' → tanımlayıcı relative.
feedback.logic: 'Yet' → zıtlık. 'A level of emotional depth that' → 'a level of + noun + that (defining)' standart yapı.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'such + that' diyerek 'such... that' result yapısı kurar; ancak 'such emotional depth that films fail' → degree result olmak için 'so great that...' şeklinde olmalı — burada karşılaştırma, degree değil.

questions.question: ---- the exhibition attracted considerable attention, ticket sales ---- fell short of expectations, ---- a review of the marketing strategy.
options: E) Even though / still / having prompted

feedback.hint: 'While + full clause' → kısmi zıtlık. 'Still fell short' → yine de geride kaldı. 'Prompting a review' → eş zamanlı sonuç.
feedback.logic: 'While the exhibition attracted' → kısmi zıtlık. 'Still fell short' → buna rağmen. 'Prompting a review' → eş zamanlı sonuç participial phrase.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'to prompt' diyerek infinitive kullanır; 'to prompt' amaç bildirir — ancak burada strateji gözden geçirilmesi bir sonuçtur, amaç değil.

questions.question: The student not only failed to cite her sources ---- reproduced entire paragraphs verbatim, ---- drawing accusations of deliberate plagiarism.

feedback.hint: 'Not only... but also' → paralel yapı. İkinci boşluk: eylem sonucu participial phrase.
feedback.logic: 'Not only failed... but also reproduced' → paralel yapı. 'Thereby drawing accusations' → eylemin sonucu participial phrase.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'therefore' diyerek 'thereby' yerine kullanır; 'therefore' tam cümle başlatır — 'drawing' participial ile kullanılamaz; 'thereby' gerekli.

questions.question: The reform was welcomed by students; ----, teachers raised concerns about implementation timelines, ---- the union called for immediate dialogue.

feedback.hint: Noktalı virgül + zıtlık. 'While the union called for dialogue' → eş zamanlı ek bilgi.
feedback.logic: 'However' → zıtlık. 'While the union called for immediate dialogue' → eş zamanlı / koordinatif bağlaç.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'yet' diyerek zıtlık kurar; 'yet the union called' burada 'the union also called' anlamı gerektirir — 'while' eş zamanlılık ve ek bilgiyi daha iyi aktarır.

questions.question: ----  teenagers may resist parental guidance during adolescence, this does not necessarily indicate ---- damaged trust ---- a natural developmental drive towards autonomy.
options: B) Although / a damaged / but rather

feedback.hint: 'Although / While' → tam cümle bağlacı. 'Not X but rather Y' → doğrultma yapısı. 'Damaged trust' → article?
feedback.logic: 'Although teenagers may resist' → tam cümle zıtlık. 'Not damaged trust but rather a natural developmental drive' → 'damaged trust' (uncountable / noun phrase without article) → 'a damaged trust' ya da sadece 'damaged trust'. 'But rather' → doğrultma.
feedback.pitfall: A şıkkı 'While' diyerek 'While' ve 'Although' arasındaki bağlamsal farkı siler; her ikisi kabul edilebilir — B'deki 'a damaged trust' daha belirli ve doğal.

questions.question: The mentor advised her mentee to set ambitious long-term goals; ----, she cautioned him ---- immediate results were unlikely and that persistence ---- key.
options: A) at the same time / that / was
D) at the same time / that / is

feedback.hint: Tavsiye verdi ama aynı zamanda uyardı → eş zamanlı zıtlık değil, ek uyarı. Backshift.
feedback.logic: 'At the same time' → eş zamanlı ek bilgi. 'Cautioned that' → backshift: 'are unlikely' → 'were unlikely'. 'That persistence was key' → backshift.
feedback.pitfall: D şıkkı 'is' diyerek backshift yapmaz; 'cautioned' (geçmiş reporting verb) backshift gerektirir — 'was key'.

questions.question: ---- the findings were preliminary, the research team chose to publish them, ---- the academic community a chance to scrutinise and replicate them.
options: C) Acknowledging / in order to give
D) Despite the fact that / giving
E) Recognising that / thereby to give

feedback.hint: İlk boşluk: bulguların ön niteliğini kabul eden participial clause. İkinci boşluk: eylemin sonucu.
feedback.logic: 'Recognising that the findings were preliminary' → concessive participial. 'Thereby giving the academic community a chance' → 'thereby + gerund' sonuç.
feedback.pitfall: E şıkkı 'thereby to give' diyerek 'thereby' ardından infinitive kullanır; 'thereby + gerund' sabit yapıdır — 'giving' gerekli.

questions.question: The policy was designed ---- to penalise struggling learners ---- to identify and address the systemic barriers ---- prevent them from reaching their potential.
options: E) not only / but also / that

feedback.hint: 'Not to X but rather to Y' → doğrultma yapısı. 'Barriers that prevent' → defining.
feedback.logic: 'Not to penalise but rather to identify' → doğrultma yapısı. 'Systemic barriers that prevent them' → defining relative: 'that'.
feedback.pitfall: B şıkkı 'which' diyerek defining bağlamda 'which' kullanır; 'systemic barriers' defining bağlamda 'that' daha standart.

questions.question: ---- she had anticipated considerable opposition, the reception ---- her proposal received was, on the whole, surprisingly constructive, ---- her original concerns largely unfounded.
options: C) Even though / that / to render

feedback.hint: İlk: tam cümle zıtlık bağlacı. İkinci: 'reception' için defining relative. Üçüncü: eş zamanlı sonuç.
feedback.logic: 'Although she had anticipated' → full clause concessive. 'The reception that her proposal received' → defining object: 'that'. 'Rendering her concerns largely unfounded' → eş zamanlı sonuç participial.
feedback.pitfall: C şıkkı 'to render' diyerek infinitive kullanır; 'rendering' eş zamanlı sonucu vurgular — 'to render' amaç ifade eder.
